business_ideas.idea: Two-phone system (kale phone for serotonin apps only, cocaine phone for addictive apps in drawer)
Sleep tracking app with weekly vs daily scores to reduce obsessive monitoring
Leverage James/Element's 3-weeks-on-1-week-off schedule as management framework for startups

predictions.text: High agency is the most underrated and important personality trait for founders and success
Rest ethic and preventing overwork will become increasingly important as leverage and code improve
People who studied niche topics or had weird teenage hobbies show early signs of high agency
